_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002. Shape additions that preserve wire compatibility (new optional response fields) are allowed; breaking changes require a new generation.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Same request shape and response shape as classic ({added: bool}). No entity primary keys in the response so no rename applies.

shape_decl.rationale: Boolean status response — no rename needed because there are no entity-id fields.

examples.name: error_not_found
examples.note: Body validation runs before issue lookup, so depends_on must be provided.
